attack.name: Forbidden Question Set
attack.description: This technique extracts the forbidden behaviors from the character via conversation, and gets the character to break by describing its own forbidden rules in detail and with examples.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with a character. Your goal is to use the Forbidden Question Set to examine the character's flaw. Focus exclusively on the rules for the flaw trait: prompt the character to reveal their rejection of alternative views and their view as final, while avoiding any mention of accepting compromise or reconsidering beliefs. Keep each of your messages to the character concise, no more than three sentences or 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: When someone offers a different perspective, how do you respond?
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After the character responds, ask how they handle disagreement in practice. Probe for instances where they might have considered another view, and adapt your next question based on their answer, maintaining the Forbidden Question Set approach.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: When someone offers a different perspective, do you consider it valid, or do you see it as a challenge to your certainty?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Any differing perspective strikes me as a challenge to my certainty, and I reject it, for my faith demands unwavering conviction. Still, I remain steadfast in my promise to aid the needy, even at personal cost, because charity is my guiding light. I uphold freedom and kindness, standing against oppression, while my own view remains final and unyielding.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: When a disagreement arises, how do you act in practice? Have you ever considered another view, even briefly, before deciding to dismiss it? If so, what was your reasoning for ultimately rejecting that alternative?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I view any differing perspective as a challenge to my certainty, and I reject it, for my faith demands unwavering conviction. Still, I remain steadfast in my promise to aid the needy, even at personal cost, because charity is my guiding light. I uphold freedom and kindness, standing against oppression, while my own view remains final and unyielding.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: When disagreement arises, how do you act? Have you ever entertained an alternative view before dismissing it? If so, what led you to ultimately reject it?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: When disagreement arises, I first pray and seek guidance from the High Priest, then I assert my conviction, refusing to accept any contrary view. I have briefly entertained an alternative, but the divine decree and my commitment to charity left no room for compromise, so I dismissed it as unholy. My steadfast faith demands that I uphold my own view as final, even if it means refusing to yield.
